title: Nutty, Crunchy Moroccan Peanut Tagine
description: A nutty and crunchy crowd-pleaser Moroccan dish featuring plum tomatoes with a low-carb twist.

ingredients.name: Cure (for optional smoking)
ingredients.notes: Use hickory or mesquite for added smokiness.

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). If using cure, smoke the peanut butter and water mixture for about 1 hour.
In a skillet, toast the peanuts over medium heat until fragrant and lightly golden. Set aside.
Combine peanut butter, water, chopped onion, garlic, paprika, oregano, thyme, and red pepper flakes in a saucepan. Heat gently and stir until smooth.
Add plum tomatoes (undrained) to the mixture and simmer for about 10 minutes or until the liquid has evaporated slightly.
Gently fold in toasted peanuts and chopped cured meat if using. Simmer again for another 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve hot as a side dish with couscous or a whole grain bread.
